title: mimosa donnell-smithii
intro: Mimosa donnell-smithii, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial legume native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Mimosa donnell-smithii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams for its medicinal use.
